label: Ritual outcome comp (gravship facilities)
description: Accumulates quality offsets from gravship facility components present on the target gravship engine. Each facility ThingDef maps to a float quality offset per unit.

label.label: Label
label.description: Display label shown in the ritual quality breakdown UI.

labelAbstract.label: Label (abstract)
labelAbstract.description: Alternative label used when no live ritual is available.

qualityOffset.label: Quality offset
qualityOffset.description: Not used directly; quality is the sum of individual facility offsets.

curve.label: Curve
curve.description: Optional SimpleCurve; not typically used by this variant.

facilityQualityOffsets.label: Facility quality offsets
facilityQualityOffsets.description: Named map from ThingDef defName to float quality offset per unit of that facility. Child element names are ThingDef defNames; text values are floats.
